failure_modes.text: The model fails when experts assume they have seen this problem before and force a familiar pattern onto a novel case.
failure_modes.source_quote: I have seen this one before, it is an X problem
failure_modes.mitigation: Challenge the assumption of familiarity: force the expert to articulate what is genuinely novel about this case before applying the old pattern.

failure_modes.text: Without intellectual humility, disconfirming evidence gets filtered out in favor of defending the current belief.
failure_modes.mitigation: Protect the flow of disconfirming evidence: without humility, inconvenient data gets filtered out in favor of the current belief.

failure_modes.text: Humility becomes fake when people signal openness but still avoid real updating, clear claims, or accountable judgment.
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger When Humility Becomes Performative Self-Minimization
failure_modes.mitigation: Require humility to produce observable changes — updated estimates, revised plans, explicit caveats — not just open-sounding language.

premortem_questions.text: What might I be missing because I am treating this as a familiar pattern too early?
premortem_questions.source_quote: I have seen this one before, it is an X problem

premortem_questions.text: What disconfirming evidence would I be tempted to explain away right now?
What update would prove this is real humility rather than openness theater?
premortem_questions.source_quote: signal openness or modesty outwardly but still avoid real updating

heuristics.text: Treat unfamiliarity and blind spots as signals to reopen assumptions instead of defending the familiar frame.
Use disconfirming evidence as a required part of the reasoning process rather than as a threat to identity.
Ask whether conventional methods are actually best before rebuilding from the facts upward.

curation_notes.summary: The source is naturally chunk-ready on anti-overconfidence, disconfirming evidence, and anti-performative-openness discipline.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor self-improvement sprawl because the raw source is stronger on updating posture and blind-spot exposure under real uncertainty.
open_questions: The first heuristic compresses repeated source material on ignorance, novelty, and familiar-pattern overreach into one reusable intervention.

allies: The raw ally surface is strongest on critical-thinking, first-principles-thinking, and feynman-technique as later relation material.
antagonists: The raw antagonist pressure is strongest on confirmation-bias and authority-shaped certainty, but only clean current-vocabulary ids should survive Wave 3.
structured_tensions: The source is tension-real around openness theater and defended certainty, but it does not expose a cleaner explicit current-vocabulary tension block than the one-hop relation surface.
